items.title: Architecture Fundamentals
items.description: Core principles of distributed systems architecture including CAP theorem, consistency models, availability, partition tolerance, and key trade-offs every engineer must understand.

items.title: Kubernetes Fundamentals
items.description: Kubernetes architecture for beginners — control plane components, worker nodes, the API server, etcd, scheduler, kubelet, kube-proxy, and how they work together to run containerised workloads.

items.title: System Design Knowledge Base
items.description: A comprehensive knowledge base for system design patterns, architectural principles, scalability strategies, and interview preparation for software engineers.
